tasks.label: test-login-api
args: $payload = json_encode(['email'=>'aiman@student.utm.my','password'=>'password123']); $ch = curl_init('http://localhost:8081/api/login'); curl_setopt_array($ch, [CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true, CURLOPT_POST => true, CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER => ['Content-Type: application/json'], CURLOPT_POSTFIELDS => $payload]); $result = curl_exec($ch); if ($result === false) { echo 'ERROR: ' . curl_error($ch); } else { echo $result; } curl_close($ch);
